name: case
description: DOCX with Word footnotes (authored via pandoc from markdown). Runner: strip_docx_metadata.py -> pandoc --track-changes=accept -> process_document.py. Pandoc emits <section class=footnotes>, handled by the traditional-footnotes path, so footnote_strategy reads 'no_footnotes' yet footnotes still extract+link. Auto-skips where pandoc is absent.
